---
title: "Courses"
description: "I teach topics in public policy, technology geopolitics, and public finance at Takshashila's programmes"
---

I design and teach courses at the [Takshashila Institution](https://takshashila.org.in) that aim to make policy thinking accessible and practical.

## Current Modules Taught

::: {.course-card}
### An Introduction to Public Finance
**Course: **Post Graduate Programme in Public Policy (PGP)

**Institution:** Takshashila Institution

I co-teach a course on public finance with Sarthak Pradhan.

[Learn more →](https://school.takshashila.org.in/)
:::

::: {.course-card}
### AI Geopolitics and Semiconductor Geopolitics
**Course: **Graduate Certificate in Public Policy (GCPP)

**Institution:** Takshashila Institution

Exploring the intersection of emerging technologies and geopolitics, including AI, semiconductors, and critical minerals

[Learn more →](https://school.takshashila.org.in/)
:::

## Past Modules

I co-taught a course on state budget analysis with Pavan Srinath. Videos available [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JDJYst6vmO4)

## Guest Lectures

I'm available for guest lectures on:

- High Technology geopolitics
- India's semiconductor strategy
- AI Geopolitics
- Indian Public Policy
- Indian Public Finance

[Contact me](mailto:pranay@takshashila.org.in) for speaking engagements.
